title: I Died, My Xp Didn't (IDMXD)
description: Players drop every bit of xp they had. Xp that players drop is undespawnable.
body:
# I Died, My Xp Didn't (IDMXD)
This mod makes so that the xp that players drop doesn't despawn and doesn't decay. All of your xp is dropped, not just 7 levels. The xp orbs can still burn in lava or get lost in the void though. This mod does not affect xp dropped by blocks or other mobs.
I suggest using this mod in pair with [I Died, My Items Didn't](https://modrinth.com/mod/idmid) as a less cheaty alternative to grave mods.


## Check out my other projects!
